title: Mission class altitude strata analysis
description: Produce trade study covering two-strata altitude profile and transition performance at 30–150 m climb phase

title: Range–payload–energy trade study
description: Trade study across 30–150 km design range covering battery capacity sizing and charging network density

title: Cruise performance specification
description: Produce vehicle performance specification covering cruise speed 150–250 km/h TAS and altitude 150–300 m AGL
notes: Interfaces with aerodynamics and propulsion domains

title: Noise assessment at vertiport boundary
description: Analytical noise prediction and test plan for ≤80 dB(A) at vertiport boundary during VTOL phases
notes: Basis for SC-VTOL noise compliance demonstration

title: Passenger cabin and payload requirements
description: Define cabin layout and emergency egress for 1–6 pax and total payload 80–600 kg including baggage allowance
notes: Egress analysis per SC-VTOL human factors

title: MTOM compliance declaration
description: Produce MTOM declaration confirming 700–3175 kg bracket and applicability to SC-VTOL Category Enhanced
notes: Required for SC-VTOL type certificate application

title: Energy reserves compliance analysis
description: Calculate battery energy margin for 20-min VFR hold plus diversion under worst-case temperature and SoH degradation
notes: Reserve policy linked to battery KNOT-AAMUAM-LC03-0003

title: Turnaround and dispatch optimisation study
description: Trade study on 5–10 min turnaround to achieve ≥10 flights per vehicle per day including fast-charging constraint
notes: Battery cycle life impact from fast charging

title: Weather minima and avionics capability plan
description: Define avionics capability roadmap from initial VFR through IFR to SC-VTOL Cat 1a including sensor and autopilot requirements
notes: Avionics maturity gate drives EIS date

title: Vertiport FATO pad sizing calculation
description: Calculate FATO minimum diameter as 1.5 × D for proposed rotor configurations (4–18 rotors) and produce infrastructure specification
notes: D = 10 × outer rotor envelope; drives vertiport partner requirements
